LAW AND MOTION 301, ARGUED; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF MCCORMACK BARON RAGAN MANAGEMENT SERVICES MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT HAS NOT CARRIED HER BURDEN OF RAISING A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO WHETHER THERE WAS NO CRIMINAL DROP ACTIVITY OR A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO AN AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE THAT COULD DEFEAT PLAINTIFF'S CASE. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189

MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-24-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCCORMACK BARON RAGAN MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INCORPORATED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHAW, JACQUELINE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1200 EDDY STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, 94115, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SHAW, JACQUELINE

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCCORMACK BARON RAGAN MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INCORPORATED AS TO DEFENDANT SHAW, JACQUELINE DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DEMAND FOR JURY AND MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE FILED BY DEFENDANT SHAW, JACQUELINE

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF JURY FEES AND EXPENSES PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT SHAW, JACQUELINE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF JURY FEES AND EXPENSES PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63 (CRC 3.62)
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF REPORTER FEE PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT SHAW, JACQUELINE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF REPORTER FEE PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63 (CRC 3.62)

LAW AND MOTION 301, MR. WALTON PROVIDED A PROPER PROOF OF SERVICE AT HEARING SHOWING TIMELY SERVICE. THEREFORE, PLAINTIFF MCCORMACK BARON RAGAN MANAGEMENT SERVICES' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT WERE SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. AT 10:05 AM, DEFENDANT, JACQUELINE SHAW MADE AN APPEARANCE IN COURT. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. AFTER THE ARGUMENT, THE COURT SET ASIDE THE PREVIOUS RULING. THE COURT ORDERED THE MATTER CONTINUED UNTIL JUNE 24, 2009 FOR FURTHER HEARING. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO FILE HER OPPOSITION TO THE MOTION NO LATER THAN JUNE 19, 2009, SERVE A COPY TO PLAINTIFF AND SUBMIT A COURTESY COPY TO ROOM 301. PLAINTIFF'S REPLY IS DUE BY NOON ON JUNE 23, 2009 WITH SERVICE TO DEFENDANT AND COURTESY COPY TO ROOM 301. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
